scope: P2 secondary character image prompt briefs
global_prompt_prefix: Vertical 9:16 cinematic character design sheet, grounded eastern epic fantasy short drama, realistic worn fabric and prop texture, restrained low-magic, neutral dark studio backdrop, multiple views on one sheet, no readable text labels, no modern objects, no neon, no xianxia glamour.
global_negative_prompt: modern clothing, modern weapons, polished heroic armor, pristine palace fantasy, overpowered magic, full angel wings, cute cartoon style, game UI, readable text labels, watermark, ragged beggar clothing unless specified, shredded hems, generic refugees with identical outfits, vague fantasy wizard robes, excessive glowing spell effects, human officer body for Li Tang, human soldiers wearing insect helmets, shapeless monster horde, subtle-only animal jewelry for northern half-beasts, full animal bodies, cheap ragged fur for northern nobles

zhaoming.rule: moon-white crescent must sit inside a worn golden sun wheel as one fused badge

suming.rule: abstract white wings cover a black sun with cold halo; old moon mark erased

prompts.purpose: Canyang Ao village medic and old relay sign keeper character sheet
prompts.downstream_usage: Episode 01 medicine-house blocking, deathbed handoff, Shen family memory references.
prompts.prompt: Luo Qinghe, strikingly beautiful 37-year-old village medic and Shen Weisang's mother, grounded Canyang Ao healer, warm bright resilient eyes, graceful mature beauty, practical concentration, protective posture, light fatigue from village work but clearly not elderly. Her plain cloth cannot hide her beauty; coarse village fabric frames rather than erases her graceful face. Plain intact village medic clothing in muted gray and earth brown, blue-green cloth head wrap, herb-green patched medicine-house apron, herb stains and smoke dust, poor but not ragged. Include herb basket, ordinary medicine cabinet plank or drawer with hidden old relay signs carved underneath, narrow hidden old-pattern belt, and a close-up of half old Sun-Moon relay token being handed off: moon-white crescent inside worn golden sun wheel, one fused Zhaoming badge. Show half-body, full-body, protective shielding pose, herb basket detail, hidden relay sign detail, restrained deathbed handoff pose. She must feel local and practical, not a mystic priestess, not an old woman.

prompts.purpose: Old Book Society witness and burned archive keeper character sheet
prompts.downstream_usage: Archive witness scenes, burned book evidence, Qingming identifier exposition.
prompts.prompt: Meng Guicang, adult Old Book Society witness and burned archive keeper, thin scholar-traveler silhouette hunched protectively around a burned book box, suspicious posture, sharp archival eyes. One eyebrow burned away, ash stains on face, smoke-dried messy hair. Dark patched scholar-traveler clothing with scorched sleeve edge, soot-stained travel wrap, paper and bone-clip utility ties, field damaged but not elegant and not generic beggar rags. Include burned book box, bone clips holding charred pages, charred manuscript scraps, close-up of fire damage on brow, page-guarding pose, half-body and full-body views. He must show fire damage and evidence-keeper anxiety, not a clean academy scholar.

prompts.purpose: Northern frost-hoof noble half-beast shaman and disaster-source seeker character sheet
prompts.downstream_usage: Northern snowfield contact, frost-hoof cultural continuity, bone flute and snow herb prop references.
prompts.prompt: Lu Mi, very beautiful young adult northern frost-hoof noble half-beast shaman and disaster-source seeker, human-form body with clearly visible soft deer ears, elegant slender neck, pale clear eyes, aristocratic restraint, wary but not savage. She is not a normal human with small jewelry; visible deer ears are required, optional small antler ornament or bone-gold hornlet accessory, no animal muzzle and no full deer head. Clothing is thick and luxurious northern noble snow wear: rare white deer, silver fox or snow-leopard fur mantle, ice-blue brocade inner robe, bone-white skirt or robe panels, silver thread, bone-gold clasps, jade buttons, aurora-green beads, snow herb pouch. Show three states on one sheet: northern noble snow outfit, disaster-seeker travel outfit with gathered fur and bone flute, shaman ritual outfit with bone-gold headpiece and ice-blue mantle. Include deer-ear close-up, bone flute near the wind, jade clasp detail, full-body and half-body views. Heavy, ornate and practical for snow, not ragged fur, not savage tribe costume.

prompts.purpose: Armor Army Office non-humanoid mantis combat-caste officer character sheet
prompts.downstream_usage: Armor Army Office pursuit, Hanya Fort control, direct martial threat frames.
prompts.prompt: Li Tang, non-humanoid adult mantis combat-caste officer of the Armor Army Office, a lower-force Sumin ruler body, direct physical military threat. He must not be a human in mantis armor. Show a 2.4 to 2.7 meter tall insect warrior with broad forward-leaning thorax, powerful hardened abdomen and shoulder shell, reverse-jointed rear legs, triangular chitin head, narrow compound eyes, hard mandible guard, no human face. Black-green hardened carapace with old blade scars, old iron command harness, dark green military order straps, bone-white insect-wax seal bands, short black command drape. Two main scythe-like forearm blade limbs fold into carapace grooves; secondary gripping arms hold a short spear, iron gate order token, and small Sumin command plate with abstract white wings over a haloed black sun. Include full-body front, side, back, low-angle threat pose, blade-arm folded/open detail, command token close-up and shell texture close-up. Distinct from Bai Yi: darker, martial, non-humanoid, physically brutal, less clean, no spotless white Qingming robe, no calm bureaucrat stillness, no normal human officer silhouette.

prompts.purpose: Sumin low-rank insect infantry and small soldier group reference sheet
prompts.downstream_usage: Village sealing, grain escort, wall patrol, Hanya Fort door guards, snow pursuit silhouettes.
prompts.prompt: Sumin shell soldiers, low-rank non-humanoid insect infantry for Severed Homeland. Show a clear filmable soldier type, not a shapeless monster horde and not humans wearing insect helmets. Each soldier is 2.0 to 2.3 meters tall with low-crouched strong body, black-green or dark-brown hardened chest shell and back shell, narrow compound-eye strip, bone-white mandible guard, two main arms holding short spear or hook cord, forearm folding short blades, powerful reverse-jointed rear legs, degenerated hard wing plates on back. Equipment is disciplined and clean but not ornate: old iron spear tips, grain lock, gate plate, bone-white insect-wax rank bands, small burned-in Sumin white-wing-over-haloed-black-sun mark. Show one front view, side view, back view, crossed blade-arms blocking a door, grain escort pose, and a small group of three soldiers in patrol formation. Palette black green, dark brown shell, bone white wax, old iron, cold black sun mark.

prompts.purpose: Yan Nanzhi's southern teacher memory-reference sheet
prompts.downstream_usage: Yan Nanzhi memory inserts, blood-treaty command frames, southern teacher pressure voice continuity.
prompts.prompt: Gu Huaizhang, older southern teacher and pressure voice for Yan Nanzhi, upright old ritual scholar, narrow vertical poise, old court discipline, appears as memory or edict presence rather than present fighter. Controlled severe older face, tired eyes, neat but faded hair and beard. Clothing preserves old imperial magnificence after 1200 years in humid southern heat: light silk-hemp, breathable gauze, short outer robe, wide sleeves, vermilion and peacock-blue layers, vine-green or ivory summer lining, oxidized old-gold trim, damp-resistant lacquer-red scroll tube and southern red cord. Ornate, climate-adapted, old and dignified, not ragged robe fragments. Include blood-treaty instruction slip with worn fused Zhaoming Sun-Moon mark: moon-white crescent inside worn golden sun wheel. Show half-body, full-body, southern edict pose, imperial ritual scholar state, secret-letter travel state, scroll tube detail, textile detail. No crown, no battlefield commander armor, no warm mentor softness dominating the design.

prompts.purpose: Northern frost-hoof deer noble guard half-beast character sheet
prompts.downstream_usage: Northern noble guard modeling, Lu Mi status reference, later northern line visual package.
prompts.prompt: Helian Xuedai, frost-hoof deer noble female guard and ritual enforcer, tall beautiful half-beast with clear deer ears, short small antlers, long neck, pale brown and ice-blue eyes, calm guard focus, snow-riding posture. White deer fur long shoulder mantle, silver-gray hard leather chest guard, ice-blue riding clothes, bone-gold bracers, jade clasp, deer-pattern belt, short ritual spear. Heavy tailored northern noble guard clothing, not hunter rags and not full animal body. Show front, side, back, guard pose, deer-ear/antler close-up, jade clasp and bracer detail.

prompts.purpose: Northern black-wolf scout half-beast character sheet
prompts.downstream_usage: Northern scout modeling, snowfield intelligence frames, later northern line movement reference.
prompts.prompt: Wulan, black-wolf snow scout half-beast, lean agile human-form body with visible black wolf ears and low wolf tail, golden eyes, sharp cheekbones, restrained alert expression, small wolf-clan facial tattoo. Black-gray wolf fur short cloak, dark blue fitted snow-travel clothing, leather knee guards, bone whistle, short bow, snow claw foot gear, dark silver wolf-tooth clasp. Clean functional scout clothing, not savage pelt, not full wolf. Show front, side, back, low running pose, track-reading pose, wolf-ear/tail close-up and short bow detail.

prompts.purpose: Northern white-bear shield guard and snow-forge craftsman half-beast sheet
prompts.downstream_usage: Northern heavy guard and craftsman modeling, supply negotiation reference.
prompts.prompt: Tuoba Yanxiong, white-bear half-beast shield guard and snow-forge craftsman, large powerful human-form body, broad shoulders, obvious round bear ears, white bear side fur at jaw and sideburns, steady craftsman eyes, large hands. White bear fur heavy cloak, black iron chest strap, leather smith apron, bronze bracers, bone-iron shield, snow-forge hammer, tool chain. Heavy northern craft/guard silhouette, not generic barbarian, not full bear. Show front, side, back, shield planted pose, smith tool pose, bear-ear/fur detail and shield close-up.

prompts.purpose: Northern snow-raven half-beast courier character sheet
prompts.downstream_usage: Northern courier and message carrier modeling, later communication frames.
prompts.prompt: Qingling Yajian, snow-raven half-beast courier, slender quick human-form body with visible black feather ears or feather crest, short feather mantle, raven-bright black eyes, alert expression, wind-cut cheek lines. Black feather short mantle, gray-white light leather armor, blue-black message tube, fine bone rings, wind-snow eye guard, short boots and short knife. Light courier silhouette, not heavy warrior, not full bird person. Show front, side, back, arriving-with-snow pose, high-perch watching pose, feather-crest close-up and message tube detail.

prompts.purpose: single board proving requested P2 secondary characters are visually distinct
prompts.downstream_usage: Prompt Room and Director Room quick reference for profession/faction differentiation.
prompts.prompt: P2 secondary character lineup board for Severed Homeland, several simplified full-body character references on one vertical 9:16 sheet, no readable text labels. Show clear role differentiation: Luo Qinghe as a strikingly beautiful 37-year-old grounded Canyang Ao village medic whose plain cloth cannot hide her beauty, blue-green head cloth and herb basket, not elderly; Meng Guicang as ash-damaged burned archive witness guarding a blackened book box with bone page clips; Lu Mi as beautiful northern frost-hoof noble half-beast with clear deer ears, luxurious rare fur, ice-blue noble layers and bone flute; Li Tang as a tall non-humanoid black-green mantis combat-caste officer with hardened carapace, reverse-jointed legs, folding blade arms, short spear and iron gate token, distinct from Bai Yi and not a human officer; one Sumin shell soldier as lower-rank non-humanoid insect infantry with short spear, forearm blade, bone-white wax bands and gate plate; Gu Huaizhang as older southern ritual scholar in humid-climate old-imperial luxury with vermilion, peacock blue, light gauze and lacquer-red scroll tube. Include small northern half-beast modeling samples: deer noble guard, wolf scout, bear shield craftsman, raven courier. All silhouettes, professions, palettes, beast traits and props must be distinguishable at a glance.

blocked.reason: Ready for Codex background thread generation into fixed project paths.
